evals.prompt: Analyze the top 5 design trends across all our scraped product data. I want to see which nighty designs have the strongest B2B fit and market signal.
evals.expected_output: JSON output to trends.json with top 5 clusters ranked by 25-point B2B score, including design attributes, market signal (products, sources, ratings, prices), and decision recommendations (Send Now / Send as Backup / etc.)

evals.prompt: Show me the top 10 trends from Amazon only. I want to see which designs are performing best on that platform specifically.
evals.expected_output: JSON output filtered to Amazon source only, showing top 10 ranked clusters with B2B scores, separated source metrics (Amazon product count), and design recommendations

evals.prompt: Find design clusters with solid evidence — only show me designs that have at least 5 products in the data. Top 5 please.
evals.expected_output: JSON output filtered to clusters with product_count >= 5, ranked by total score, showing only designs with minimum evidence threshold
